items.title: Karl-Anthony Towns on Wemby:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Karl-Anthony Towns on Wemby: 

"He's going to be something special for a lot of years to come.  Once-in-a-generation athlete.

"Shout out to the Spurs, too.  They're the real deal.

"Shout out to Jersey's own, Dylan Harper; he's the real deal."

items.title: Jalen Brunson on the Spurs: “That's a hell of a group. That's a well-coached (team). The culture they have is clearly evident. They have it. And so a lot of respect to them and what they brought to the table. I'm just happy were able to find ways to win four games."

items.title: Knicks coach Mike Brown on Jalen Brunson: “He’s a top-3 MVP candidate. Everybody kind of mentions his name in passing. They don’t do it seriously enough. People say he’s too small. People say he’s a 1B or a 2B. He’s a freaking 1A. He’s an MVP candidate. He is him.”

* 6-0 Four-star recruit ranked 170th in his class

* Led Puerto Rico to first Olympics in 20 years
* Won NBA title

items.title: Fox on his tough night:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Fox on his tough night:

"I got shots I've made in the past and sometimes you just don't make them. Some felt good. Back rim, in and out. It is what it is. Obviously, I wish I made those shots, but that team is physical. They force you into making jump shots and try to keep you out of the paint."

items.title: Fox on his tough night:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Fox on his tough night:

items.title: Stephon Castle on how the Knicks defense made it tough on him and his teammates:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Stephon Castle on how the Knicks defense made it tough on him and his teammates:

“They crowded the pick and rolls a lot, made us stagnant on the ball. When we tried get to isolation, they took away passing lanes too, made us play one-on-one a lot.”

items.title: Think about this..
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Think about this..

Jalen Brunson..2nd round pick. 

Brunson turned down down Mavs lowball extension.He knew playing Robin to Luka’s Batman wasn’t it. 

Brunson leaving Luka in Dallas to run his show in NY. No “Superteam”. No other generational player on NY roster

Brunson wins a title before Luka.

items.title: The points by the LA Sparks in the final 7:10 of regulation tonight:
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt:
The points by the LA Sparks in the final 7:10 of regulation tonight:

- Kelsey Plum FTS (2)
- Kelsey Plum 3PT (5)
- Kelsey Plum FTS (7)
- Kelsey Plum 2PT (9)
- Kelsey Plum 3PT (12)
- Kelsey Plum 3PT (15)
- Kelsey Plum 2PT (17) 

Plum’s final 12 tied or gave the Sparks the lead.

items.title: This ended up not mattering, but -- I didn't think it was a flagrant. Clearly a landing zone foul, but not every landing zone is a flagrant. Here's why ...
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
This ended up not mattering, but -- I didn't think it was a flagrant. Clearly a landing zone foul, but not every landing zone is a flagrant. Here's why ...

www.nytimes.com/athletic/735...

media.title: NBA dodges tough decision after no-call on Victor Wembanyama contest of Jalen Brunson shot
media.description: With New York trying to close out the NBA Finals, Jalen Brunson's frustration boiled over after a controversial no-call.
